final:
// // This T-type flip-flop toggles its output state on the falling edge of the clock when the toggle input (t) is high.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input d,
    input t,
    output reg q );always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (t) begin
            q <= ~q;
        end else begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This T-type flip-flop toggles its output state on the falling edge of the clock when the toggle input (t) is high.
